questionHtml:
Which factors affect the amount, in mol, of product formed during electrolysis?

I.   The charge on the ion
II.  The molar mass of the ion
III. The duration of the electrolysis

A.  I and II only

B.  I and III only

C.  II and III only

D.  I, II and III
